purpose: Require tracker state to bind current stage status to the receipt and handoff that authorize the next stage.
binding_rules: A stage may not be marked DONE unless a receipt path and handoff path exist.
The tracker state's latest evidence must include both the stage receipt and the stage handoff with SHA-256 hashes.
The tracker history entry for the stage must reference the receipt path and handoff path.
The next_allowed_action must match the next command authorized by the handoff.
The tracker render preview must be generated after state update and must start with the top-of-response tracker marker.
